name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-10
title: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog references deleted backlog-item-status.py
description: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog (lines 113-164) targets backlog-item-status.py which no longer exists (unified into item-status.py). os.path.isfile at line 130 always returns False so the function is dead code. Spec invariant 4 still claims auto-close works.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-12 (auto_close_backlog references deleted script)
